title: Before dawn, ancient drum rite wakes Istanbul faithful to fast
description: It's 3:30 a.m. and lights are slowly coming on in the homes lining a narrow Istanbul street as people are woken up by the rhythmic thump of a drum.

title: Ancient asteroid blast left vast glass field
description: A colossal asteroid strike about 6.3 million years ago scattered molten debris across what is now south-eastern Brazil, leaving behind a vast field of natural glass that researchers say ranks among South America’s most significant impact remnants. Scientists have identified and mapped hundreds of dark, aerodynamic glass fragments across parts of Minas Gerais and neighbouring states, naming the material “geraisites” after the region where the first samples [...]The article Ancient asteroid blast left vast glass field appeared first on Arabian Post.

title: Bardon Mill author launches podcast on North’s ancient landscapes
description: Stories of ancient volcanoes and lost coastlines are set to come to life in a new podcast series.

title: Palaeontologist’s dream comes true with chance to study 500-million-year-old fossil at Curtin University
description: Eleanor Beidatsch, of Mt Barker, has always wanted to be a palaeontologist, so an invitation from Curtin University to conduct groundbreaking research on a 520-million-year-old fossil was a dream come true.

title: Archaeologists Unearth 36 Bronze Age Short Swords and 50 Ancient Arrowheads
description: US authorities have captured a shipment containing 36 Bronze Age short swords and 50 arrowheads at the Port of Philadelphia. These artifacts, believed to be almost 4,000 years old, were identified as legitimate cultural items originating from ancient Iran. The seizure occurred, when US Customs and Border Protection flagged the cargo during standard screenings. Officials [...]The post Archaeologists Unearth 36 Bronze Age Short Swords and 50 Ancient Arrowheads appeared first on The CSR Journal.
